login.title: Byakko Admin
login.subtitle: Restricted access — authorized personnel only
login.error: Invalid credentials. Check your email and password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.createFirstClient: Create your first client to get started.
dashboard.usersWillAppear: Users will appear here once clients are created.

clients.title: Clients
clients.description: Manage API clients and their access keys.
clients.name: Name
clients.createFirst: Create your first API client to get started.

create.title: New Client
create.description: Register a new API client. The API key will be shown once.
create.nameHint: A descriptive name for this client
create.hmacHint: Optional. Used to sign webhook payloads.
create.copyWarning: Copy this key now. For security reasons, it will not be shown again. Store it in a safe place — you will need to regenerate it if lost.

edit.title: Edit {{name}}
edit.description: Update webhook URL or rotate the HMAC secret.
edit.webhookPlaceholder: Leave blank to remove the current URL.
edit.hmacPlaceholder: Enter new secret to rotate. Leave blank to keep the existing secret.

actions.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the client and revoke its API key. All associated data will be lost.

detail.noUsersDescription: This client has no registered users yet.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage users and their permissions across clients.
users.name: Name
users.createFirst: Create a user to get started. Users are scoped to a client.

create.title: New User
create.description: Create a new user for a client.

users.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the user and revoke all their permissions. This action cannot be undone.

detail.noPermissionsGranted: This user has no permissions granted yet.
detail.revokeConfirm: This will remove access for this permission. The user will no longer be able to perform this action.
detail.noHistoryDescription: No permission changes have been recorded for this user.
detail.grantedViaApi: Granted via API (not by a user)
detail.cannotLoad: Cannot load user details. Navigate from the users list or provide clientId in the URL.
detail.allPermissionsGranted: All permissions in this category are already granted.
detail.makeAdminDescription: This will grant all client permissions to this user. This action is not easily reversible.
detail.makeAdminSuccess: The user now has all client permissions.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Permission categories organized in a hierarchy.
categories.name: Name
categories.createFirst: Create a category to organize permissions.

create.title: New Category
create.description: Create a new permission category for a client.
create.parentHint: Optional. Create as a root category if not selected.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.description: Manage permission actions for clients and categories.
permissions.createFirst: Create a permission to define actions for users.

create.title: New Permission
create.description: Create a new permission for a client and category.

actions.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete the permission and revoke access for all users who had it. This action cannot be undone.

relationConditions.title: Relation Conditions
relationConditions.description: Condition keys that extend permission checks with context.
relationConditions.createFirst: Create a condition key to extend permission checks.

create.title: New Relation Condition
create.description: Create a condition key for a permission.

errorState.title: Something went wrong
errorState.description: Failed to load data. Please try again.
